# Picsart gen-ai CLI, MCP & Skills

> Developer docs for driving Picsart's AI catalog — 165 models from 31 providers across image (67), video (74), and audio (19) — from your terminal with the gen-ai CLI, or from any AI agent via Skills and MCP. One OAuth login, one credit balance, pay per generation.

The same model registry powers three interfaces (CLI, Skills, MCP). Every model has a stable id usable identically from `gen-ai generate -m <id>` and the `picsart_generate` MCP tool. For a point-and-click web UI instead, see the AI Playground app (linked under Optional).

## Getting started
- [Introduction](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/guide/introduction): what this is and the three interfaces
- [Installation](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/guide/installation): install the gen-ai CLI (npm or install script)
- [Authentication](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/guide/authentication): `gen-ai login` OAuth web login

## Interfaces
- [CLI Quickstart](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/guide/cli-quickstart): generate, batch, pipe, upload from the terminal
- [MCP Quickstart](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/guide/mcp-quickstart): expose the catalog to any MCP-compatible agent
- [Skills](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/guide/skills): drop-in skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, ChatGPT

## Concepts
- [Generating media](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/guide/generating): prompts, inputs, aspect ratio, duration, outputs
- [Files & Drive](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/guide/files-and-drive): upload, download, and list files on Picsart Drive
- [Pricing & Credits](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/guide/pricing): per-generation credit cost; estimate before running
- [Batch & Automation](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/guide/batch): manifest runner, from-dir, auto-download

## Model reference
- [Model Reference overview](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/): all 165 models, how to read a provider page
- [Model Catalog](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/catalog): searchable, filterable catalog of every model
- [Image generation](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/image): 67 image models
- [Video generation](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/video): 74 video models
- [Audio generation](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/audio): 19 audio models

## Providers
Each provider page lists its models with CLI + MCP examples, a parameter table sourced from the live catalog, and links to official vendor docs.
- [All providers](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/): index of all 31 providers
- [Anthropic](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/anthropic): 3 models — text
- [Async](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/async): 1 model — audio
- [ByteDance](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/bytedance): 2 models — video
- [Creatify](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/creatify): 1 model — video
- [ElevenLabs](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/elevenlabs): 10 models — audio
- [Flux (Black Forest Labs)](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/flux): 5 models — image
- [Google](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/google): 15 models — text, image, video, audio
- [Grok (xAI)](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/grok): 7 models — image, video, audio
- [Happy Horse](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/happyhorse): 5 models — video
- [HeyGen](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/heygen): 1 model — video
- [Hunyuan](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/hunyuan): 1 model — image
- [Ideogram](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/ideogram): 3 models — image
- [Kling](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/kling): 14 models — image, video, audio
- [LTX (Lightricks)](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/ltx): 5 models — video
- [Luma](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/luma): 9 models — image, video
- [MiniMax](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/minimax): 5 models — video, audio
- [OpenAI](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/openai): 6 models — text, image, video
- [OVI](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/ovi): 1 model — video
- [Picsart](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/picsart): 7 models — image
- [Pika](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/pika): 3 models — video
- [PixVerse](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/pixverse): 6 models — video
- [Qwen (Alibaba)](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/qwen): 3 models — image
- [Recraft](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/recraft): 20 models — image
- [Reve](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/reve): 1 model — image
- [Runway](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/runway): 4 models — image, video
- [Seedance](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/seedance): 9 models — video
- [Seedream](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/seedream): 2 models — image
- [Topaz](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/topaz): 9 models — image
- [VEED](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/veed): 2 models — video
- [Videography](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/videography): 1 model — video
- [Wan (Alibaba)](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/reference/providers/wan): 4 models — video

## Optional
- [Changelog](https://picsart.github.io/picsart-mcp-cli-docs/changelog): recent catalog and CLI/MCP changes
- [AI Playground app](https://picsart.com/ai-playground/): browser-based web UI for the same catalog
